title: TS25 2DF, Gee Dee Cleansing Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/CP3892LQ/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Gee Dee Cleansing Limited Installation name: Unit 1 Graythorp Industrial Estate Permit number: EPR/CP3892LQ/V005  "
